title: AwesomeNeeded
description: The ultimate all-in-one Essentials replacement with full in-game UIs, economy, shops, claims, kits, crates, rewards, RTP, TPA, scoreboards, messages, moderation tools, and so much more тАФ all in one plugin.
body:
# AwesomeNeeded - All-in-One Essentials Framework

**The ultimate essentials plugin for Minecraft servers with full in-game GUI support!**

AwesomeNeeded is a comprehensive, feature-rich essentials framework designed for Minecraft 1.19.x - 1.21.x servers running Paper, Spigot, or Bukkit. Built from the ground up with performance and usability in mind, it provides everything you need to run a professional Minecraft server.

---

## тЬи Key Features

### ЁЯОо **Player Features**
- **Teleportation System** - TPA requests, random teleport (RTP), spawn points, homes, and warps
- **Economy System** - Built-in economy with Vault integration for compatibility
- **Shop System** - Fully customizable in-game shop with GUI interface
- **Kits** - Timed kits with cooldowns and permissions (includes 3 default kits)
- **Crates** - Reward crate system with animations (includes 3 default crates)
- **Claims** - Land protection system with trust management
- **Homes & Warps** - Multiple home locations and server-wide warp points
- **Backpacks** - Extra inventory space for players
- **Achievements** - Custom achievement system with rewards

### ЁЯСС **VIP Features**
- **Fly Time** - Timed flight system with automatic management
- **Nicknames** - Custom display names with color support
- **Daily/Weekly Rewards** - Scheduled rewards for player retention
- **Boosters** - XP and money multipliers
- **Custom Heads** - Access to custom player head database

### ЁЯЫбя╕П **Moderation Tools**
- **Punishment System** - Mute, ban, kick, warn with duration support
- **Anti-Cheat** - Built-in cheat detection system
- **Action Logging** - Comprehensive logging of player actions
- **Admin Tools** - Invsee, freeze, vanish, and more
- **Chat Management** - Chat filters, formatting, and moderation

### ЁЯУК **Server Management**
- **Scoreboard** - Dynamic sidebar with live player stats
- **Tab List** - Customizable player list formatting
- **Performance Tools** - Anti-lag features and resource monitoring
- **Module System** - Toggle features on/off as needed
- **World Manager** - Multi-world support and management
- **Region Titles** - Location-based title messages

### ЁЯФз **Utility Commands**
- `/workbench` - Open crafting table anywhere
- `/anvil` - Open anvil interface
- `/enderchest` - Access your ender chest
- `/hat` - Wear any item as a hat
- `/trash` - Disposable trash GUI
- `/heal` - Heal yourself or others
- `/feed` - Restore hunger
- And 30+ more utility commands!

---

## ЁЯОп What Makes AwesomeNeeded Different?

### **All-in-One Solution**
Stop juggling multiple plugins! AwesomeNeeded combines 40+ essential features into one optimized package.

### **GUI-First Design**
Every feature has an intuitive in-game GUI - no need to memorize complex commands or edit config files in-game.

### **Performance Focused**
- Efficient database handling with HikariCP connection pooling
- Async operations where possible
- Minimal server impact with optimized code

### **Highly Configurable**
- 6 configuration files for complete customization
- JSON-based data persistence for transparency
- Module system to enable/disable features

### **Modern & Maintained**
- Built with Adventure API for modern text components
- Supports latest Minecraft versions (1.19.x - 1.21.x)
- Regular updates and bug fixes

---

## ЁЯУж Default Content Included

### **Kits (3 Pre-configured)**
- **Starter Kit** - Stone tools, food, basic supplies (24h cooldown)
- **VIP Kit** - Iron gear, better items (12h cooldown)
- **MVP Kit** - Diamond gear, premium items (6h cooldown)

### **Crates (3 Pre-configured)**
- **Common Crate** - Diamonds, emeralds, gold, iron
- **Rare Crate** - Diamond blocks, netherite scraps, totems
- **Epic Crate** - Netherite ingots, elytra, beacons

---

## ЁЯФМ Integration Support

### **Optional Dependencies (Soft Dependencies)**
- **Vault** - Economy integration (has built-in fallback)
- **PlaceholderAPI** - Dynamic placeholder support
- **LuckPerms** - Advanced permission integration

All integrations are optional - AwesomeNeeded works perfectly standalone!

---

## ЁЯЪА Quick Start

1. Download `AwesomeNeeded-1.0.0.0.jar`
2. Place in your server's `plugins/` folder
3. Start/restart your server
4. Configuration files auto-generate in `plugins/AwesomeNeeded/`
5. Customize configs to your liking
6. Use `/awesome` to access the main control panel

---

## ЁЯОо Command Overview

**Teleportation:** `/tpa`, `/tpaccept`, `/tpdeny`, `/rtp`, `/spawn`, `/home`, `/warp`, `/back`

**Economy:** `/balance`, `/pay`, `/shop`, `/eco`

**Features:** `/kit`, `/crate`, `/claim`, `/fly`, `/daily`, `/weekly`

**Social:** `/nick`, `/afk`, `/msg`, `/reply`

**Moderation:** `/ban`, `/kick`, `/mute`, `/warn`, `/freeze`, `/invsee`

**Utilities:** `/workbench`, `/anvil`, `/heal`, `/feed`, `/hat`, `/trash`

**Admin:** `/setspawn`, `/setwarp`, `/eco`, `/module`, `/awesome admin`

And many more! Full command list in documentation.

---

## ЁЯУЛ Permissions

All permissions follow the format: `awesome.<feature>`

- `awesome.user` - Basic player features
- `awesome.vip` - VIP features (fly, nicknames, etc.)
- `awesome.admin` - Administrative commands
- `awesome.*` - All permissions

Granular permissions available for every feature!

---

## ЁЯТ╛ Data Storage

- **Configuration:** YAML files for easy editing
- **Player Data:** JSON files for transparency and portability
- **Database:** MySQL or SQLite support with HikariCP pooling
- **Automatic Backups:** Configurable data backup system

---

## ЁЯМР Server Compatibility

- **Minecraft Versions:** 1.19.x, 1.20.x, 1.21.x
- **Server Software:** Paper (recommended), Spigot, Bukkit
- **Java Version:** Java 17 or higher
- **Dependencies:** None required (all optional)

---

## ЁЯУК Statistics

- **40+ Manager Systems** - Comprehensive feature coverage
- **40+ Commands** - With tab completion support
- **6 Config Files** - Complete customization
- **4.7 MB** - Lightweight and optimized
- **Zero Dependencies Required** - Works standalone
- **1.19+ Support** - Modern Minecraft compatibility

---

## тЪб Performance

AwesomeNeeded is designed with performance in mind:

- Optimized database queries with prepared statements
- Async operations for I/O-heavy tasks
- Efficient event handling with minimal overhead
- Smart caching to reduce redundant operations
- Resource monitoring and anti-lag features included

Suitable for servers of all sizes - from small community servers to large networks!

---

## ЁЯОи Customization

Every aspect is customizable:
- Custom messages in `messages.yml`
- Feature toggles in `config.yml`
- Shop items in `shop.yml`
- Kit contents in `kits.yml`
- Crate rewards in `crates.yml`
- Module states in memory

Make it yours!

---

## ЁЯПЖ Why Choose AwesomeNeeded?

тЬЕ **Complete Solution** - Everything you need in one plugin
тЬЕ **User-Friendly** - Intuitive GUIs for all features
тЬЕ **Performance** - Optimized for minimal server impact
тЬЕ **Flexible** - Enable/disable features as needed
тЬЕ **Modern** - Built with latest APIs and best practices
тЬЕ **Supported** - Active development and updates
тЬЕ **Free** - Open source and free to use

---

## ЁЯУЭ License

AwesomeNeeded is open source software.

---

## ЁЯЩП Support the Project

If you enjoy AwesomeNeeded:
- ЁЯУв Share with other server owners
- ЁЯРЫ Report bugs to help us improve
- ЁЯТб Suggest features you'd like to see
- ЁЯУЭ Write a review on Modrinth

---

**Ready to transform your Minecraft server? Download AwesomeNeeded today!**
